                <div class="consent-info-heading" innerhtml.bind="(widgetBundle.piiconsentInfoHeading || '')|pht | sanitizeHTML" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748348467655-ph-consent-popup-v1crjob-RHj85T"></div>
                <label repeat.for="eachConsent of widgetContext.consentData" class="pii-consent-label" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748348467655-ph-consent-popup-v1crjob-17HjXZ">

'consent-error-' + instanceId : ''}" checked.bind="eachConsent.isChecked" aria-checked="${eachConsent.isChecked?'true':'false'}" aria-required="${!eachConsent.optional ? 'true':false}" change.delegate="isButtonDisabled()" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748348467655-ph-consent-popup-v1crjob-KUyeuv">
                    <span class="checkbox-selected" aria-hidden="true" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748348467655-ph-consent-popup-v1crjob-5X2GOb"></span>

                        <span class="consent-mandatory" aria-hidden="true" if.bind="!eachConsent.optional" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748348467655-ph-consent-popup-v1crjob-7rqbXC">*</span>

                <div class="consent-info-description" innerhtml.bind="(widgetBundle.piiconsentInfoDescription || '')|pht | sanitizeHTML" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748348467655-ph-consent-popup-v1crjob-VDloM4"></div>

    </div>
</div></script><script type="text/x-ph-tmpl" id="ph-candidate-login-v1-default-mobile-1748348624833" nonce=""><div class="candidate-login-widget-area" data-ph-id="ph-default-mobile-1748337079239-ph-candidate-login-v1oiuytr-f8fYHK">

</div></script><script type="text/x-ph-tmpl" id="ph-candidate-login-v1-default-1748348734980" nonce=""><div class="candidate-login-widget-area" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-2B9odx">

    <!-- Content block -->
    <div class="content-block" if.bind="!isHeadingDisabled" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-ABWHmb">

        <a class="create-account-link" if.bind="isFirstTimeUser && !isLoggedIn && !showLoader" role="button" click.delegate="handleDialogModal('signUp')" href="javascript:void(0)" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-06Dj2T">
            <i class="${widgetBundle['signInIcon'] | pht}" aria-hidden="true" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-ojgWkd"></i>

        </a>

        <!-- Post Sign-in region -->
        <div class="post-sign-in-action-area" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-Ocz5l1">
            <div class="sr-only" aria-live="assertive" aria-atomic="true" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-QvUWgL">
                <span if.bind="registeredSuccessfully" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-OLwnGQ">
                    Registered Successfully
                </span>
            </div>
            <!-- Post Sign-in button -->
            <button if.bind="isLoggedIn && !showLoader" class="logged-in-btn ph-a11y-after-close-focus-elem ${isDropdownOpen?'selected':''}" aria-expanded="${isDropdownOpen?'true':'false'}" click.delegate="toggleDropDown()" aria-label="${widgetBundle['loggedInBtnAriaLabel'] | pht:{'saluteText': profileDetails.profile.firstName}}" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-KZJbVH">

                <!-- <figure>
                    <img src="" class="user-avatar" alt="" />
                </figure> -->
                <span class="user-avatar-initials fs-block" if.bind="(preferredName && profileDetails.profile.preferredName) || profileDetails.profile.firstName || profileDetails.profile.email" aria-hidden="true" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-hgPl6D">
                    <span data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-fyLvsm">${preferredName && profileDetails.profile.preferredName && profileDetails.profile.preferredName.substring(0,1) || profileDetails.profile.firstName && profileDetails.profile.firstName.substring(0,1) || profileDetails.profile.email && profileDetails.profile.email.substring(0,1)}</span>
                    <!-- <span>${profileDetails.profile.firstName && profileDetails.profile.lastName ? profileDetails.profile.lastName.substring(0,1) : ''}</span> -->
                </span>
                <span class="user-avatar-icon" if.bind="!(preferredName && profileDetails.profile.preferredName) && !profileDetails.profile.firstName && !profileDetails.profile.email" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-CHAh87">
                    <i class="icon icon-career-grow-o" aria-hidden="true" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-IJKqWc"></i>
                </span>

                <span class="user-name fs-block" title="${(preferredName && profileDetails.profile.preferredName) || profileDetails.profile.firstName || profileDetails.profile.email}" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-gz83xM">
                    ${preferredName && profileDetails.profile.preferredName || profileDetails.profile.firstName || profileDetails.profile.email}

                <!-- <span class="${isDropdownOpen ? 'up-arrow' : 'down-arrow'}"></span> -->

            </button>

            <!-- User details dropdown -->
            <div class="logged-in-drop-down" if.bind="isDropdownOpen" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-f30HW7">

                <!-- User details -->
                <div class="user-details" if.bind="profileDetails.profile.firstName || profileDetails.profile.email" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-LzMUKE">

                    <span class="user-avatar-initials fs-block" if.bind="(preferredName && profileDetails.profile.preferredName) || profileDetails.profile.firstName || profileDetails.profile.email" aria-hidden="true" data-ph-id="ph-default-1748337171655-ph-candidate-login-v1ikjhyg-KR6cf5">
